item.title: JC Penny taking a stand on civil rights.
item.description: Wow, this is really awesome. I’m glad to see civil rights progressing like this. JC Penny taking a stand on civil rights.http://joemygod.blogspot.com/2012/05/jcpenney-launches-fathers-day-ad.html
